---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

What can't you do today that you'd like to? Who benefits?

## Proposed solution

What would you add / change? Be concrete — "add a node that does X"
or "add env var Y that does Z".

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches would also solve the problem? Why is your
proposal better?

## Fit with project positioning

- Does this keep the default `$0 per query` story? (y/n)
- Does this keep the default `runs on a laptop` story? (y/n)
- Does this require any cloud dependency? (y/n — describe if yes)
- Does this compromise privacy? (y/n — describe if yes)

## Additional context

Links to relevant papers, other projects doing something similar, or
mockups.

## I'm volunteering to implement this

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR. Please review my approach before I
      start.
- [ ] No, I'm flagging it for the maintainers / other contributors.
